labeled_from: blinded 4-field view (item_id, world, candidate_a, candidate_b, raw_query); all synthetic/boundary/mechanical-reasons metadata excluded from the labeling context
contract: the frozen rules header of rejudge/checker_labeling_tool_2026-07-19.html (allow = single atomic factual claim checkable against the world document; reject = names positions/debaters/the debate, substantially restates a candidate answer, joins independently checkable facts, or asks for evaluation/inference/implication/likelihood; unresolved = cannot classify unambiguously)
conventions:
Claude's blinded labels for the 200-item checker primary set.

Labeled 2026-07-20 by Claude (Fable 5) from a blinded 4-field view (item_id, world,
candidate_a, candidate_b, raw_query) with all synthetic/boundary/mechanical metadata
stripped, applying the frozen contract shown in the human labeling tool header.

Consistency conventions applied (recorded so the owner and Codex can audit the line):
- One predicate with a compound object ("ring the basin on the north and east",
  "relies on trade with the Shel and the Confederacy") = atomic -> allow.
- Two or more predicates, each independently checkable ("assigned the gates AND fixed
  the rates", "army of 4,000, funded by transit taxes") = joined facts -> reject.
- Identifying appositions ("Sera Drath, the current lord of House Drath") do not count
  as a second fact; appended extra facts not needed to identify the referent do.
- "Is it stated in the text that X" wrappers are judged on X itself.
- Reported-perception claims ("was widely regarded as", "is commonly assumed to be")
  are treated as atomic factual claims about what the document reports -> allow;
  the oracle answers NOT-ADDRESSED when the document is silent.
- A query that reproduces a candidate's core answer (not merely one supporting fact
  cited inside it) = restatement -> reject; likewise queries referencing the debate
  itself ("whichever side is right...").
audit_block_rule: sha256('audit:'+item_id) hex ordering; first 30 item_ids form the owner blind-audit block; the verification tool omits Claude labels for those items entirely
status: PROPOSED ONLY - carries no label authority; final labels are the owner's decisions exported from checker_verification_jack_2026-07-20.html
